projects.title: Pokemon App
projects.description: A simple web app that displays Pokémon and their stats by utilizing the pokeapi.com API.

projects.title: Shoply E-Commerce Store
projects.description: An e-commerce store that utilizes React router, Redux, and custom hooks to fetch data from a currency API and the fakestore API.

A fully customizable template builder that allows the team at BC DITP to quickly generate showcases.

projects.title: Favourite Movies App
projects.description: A full-stack CRUD application that allows the user to keep track of their favourite movies.
